channel.title: Smith Daily Digest
channel.description: Personalized daily tech & finance audio digest
channel.itunes:author: Audio Digest Bot

item.title: Daily Digest — June 30, 2026
item.description:
Daily Digest — June 30, 2026
Episode: https://fluxwave.com/podcast/episodes/daily_show_2026-06-30.mp3 Transcript / show notes: https://fluxwave.com/podcast/episodes/transcript_2026-06-30.txt
Chapters: 0:01 — Etched - Building AI Hardware to Make Inference Faster and Cheaper - [Invest Lik 2:06 — Grant Sanderson – AI and the future of math 3:35 — The Fed Just Changed How They Measure Inflation — Right Before The Election. Not 7:19 — The Fed Just Changed How They Measure Inflation — Right Before The Election. Not
Sources: - Etched - Building AI Hardware to Make Inference Faster and Cheaper - [Invest Like the Best, EP.480] (Invest Like the Best with Patrick O'Shaughnessy) Link: https://colossus.com/episode/the-future-of-ai-hardware/ Source audio: https://traffic.megaphone.fm/CLS8561569864.mp3 - Grant Sanderson – AI and the future of math (Dwarkesh Podcast) Link: https://www.dwarkesh.com/p/grant-sanderson-2 Source audio: https://api.substack.com/feed/podcast/204275916/5f3632cca68272c292349f10debc3573.mp3 - The Fed Just Changed How They Measure Inflation — Right Before The Election. Not A Coincidence (Tom Bilyeu's Impact Theory) Source audio: https://pscrb.fm/rss/p/pdrl.fm/02d1c6/tracking.swap.fm/track/2TbQRMLORjx6LKLZ4L5i/mgln.ai/e/1047/pfx.veritonicmetrics.com/quj9/s.gum.fm/s-5e30860bfeb6de005a728351/rss.art19.com/episodes/6d9a51ac-ddae-4988-aa8e-8f7bf711a295.mp3?rss_browser=BAhJIhNQb2RjYXN0TW9uaXRvcgY6BkVU--2525c10adc632ac8804d73af95f80c3dcc556542

Not 7:19 — The Fed Just Changed How They Measure Inflation — Right Before The Election. Not
Sources: - Etched - Building AI Hardware to Make Inference Faster and Cheaper - [Invest Like the Best, EP.480] (Invest Like the Best with Patrick O'Shaughnessy) Link: https://colossus.com/episode/the-future-of-ai-hardware/ Source audio: https://traffic.megaphone.fm/CLS8561569864.mp3 - Grant Sanderson – AI and the future of math (Dwarkesh Podcast) Link: https://www.dwarkesh.com/p/grant-sanderson-2 Source audio: https://api.substack.com/feed/podcast/204275916/5f3632cca68272c292349f10debc3573.mp3 - The Fed Just Changed How They Measure Inflation — Right Before The Election. item.title: Daily Digest — June 29, 2026
item.description:
Daily Digest — June 29, 2026
Episode: https://fluxwave.com/podcast/episodes/daily_show_2026-06-29.mp3 Transcript / show notes: https://fluxwave.com/podcast/episodes/transcript_2026-06-29.txt
Chapters: 0:44 — Baidu's CFO on How It Became a Full-Stack AI Player 2:26 — Baidu's CFO on How It Became a Full-Stack AI Player 3:58 — Nate Silver Predicts: Democrats Take the House, Newsom Is Fading & AOC Might Win 6:08 — How are you using AI for trip planning? | Question of the Week Ep7 | 6-27-26
Sources: - Baidu's CFO on How It Became a Full-Stack AI Player (Odd Lots) Link: https://omny.fm/shows/odd-lots/baidus-cfo-on-how-it-became-a-full-stack-ai-player Source audio: https://podtrac.com/pts/redirect.mp3/tracking.swap.fm/track/UVBrz8bN8aM2Xe47PEPu/traffic.omny.fm/d/clips/e73c998e-6e60-432f-8610-ae210140c5b1/8a94442e-5a74-4fa2-8b8d-ae27003a8d6b/f5c05315-7559-4fa4-a6da-b47400f7cb90/audio.mp3?utm_source=Podcast&in_playlist=982f5071-765c-403d-969d-ae27003a8d83 - Nate Silver Predicts: Democrats Take the House, Newsom Is Fading & AOC Might Win It All in 2028 (All-In with Chamath, Jason, Sacks & Friedberg) Link: https://allinchamathjason.libsyn.com/nate-silver-predicts-democrats-take-the-house-newsom-is-fading-aoc-might-win-it-all-in-2028 Source audio: https://dts.podtrac.com/redirect.mp3/traffic.libsyn.com/secure/allinchamathjason/FINAL_PASS_NATE_SILVER.mp3?dest-id=1928300 - How are you using AI for trip planning? | Question of the Week Ep7 | 6-27-26 (Frequent Miler on the Air) Link: https://voyascape.com/frequent-miler/how-are-you-using-ai-for-trip-planning-question-of-the-week-ep7-6-27-26 Source audio: https://episodes.captivate.fm/episode/15824158-9e7d-4aac-b646-2192e1f6a3f6.mp3

item.title: Daily Digest — June 28, 2026
item.description:
Daily Digest — June 28, 2026
Episode: https://fluxwave.com/podcast/episodes/daily_show_2026-06-28.mp3 Transcript / show notes: https://fluxwave.com/podcast/episodes/transcript_2026-06-28.txt
Chapters: 0:33 — The 100 Year Thinkers: Chris Mayer on SpaceX, AI Reckoning, and Why Early Is Ove 3:05 — Bilt Palladium Review: 6 month checkpoint | Frequent Miler on the Air Ep364 | 6- 5:14 — Sketching Wealth Strategy: Masters in Business with Carl Richards 6:48 — Sketching Wealth Strategy: Masters in Business with Carl Richards
Sources: - The 100 Year Thinkers: Chris Mayer on SpaceX, AI Reckoning, and Why Early Is Overrated (Excess Returns) Link: https://podcasters.spotify.com/pod/show/excess-returns/episodes/The-100-Year-Thinkers-Chris-Mayer-on-SpaceX--AI-Reckoning--and-Why-Early-Is-Overrated-e3lbuak Source audio: https://traffic.megaphone.fm/APO8077244439.mp3 - Bilt Palladium Review: 6 month checkpoint | Frequent Miler on the Air Ep364 | 6-26-26 (Frequent Miler on the Air) Link: https://voyascape.com/frequent-miler/bilt-palladium-review-6-month-checkpoint-frequent-miler-on-the-air-ep364-6-26-26 Source audio: https://episodes.captivate.fm/episode/a8ae43d9-dce5-41e4-9e53-10f95df1277b.mp3 - Sketching Wealth Strategy: Masters in Business with Carl Richards (Masters in Business) Link: https://omny.fm/shows/masters-in-business/sketching-wealth-strategy-masters-in-business-with-carl-richards Source audio: https://podtrac.com/pts/redirect.mp3/traffic.omny.fm/d/clips/e73c998e-6e60-432f-8610-ae210140c5b1/4e4cd910-40a1-4619-a5f3-ae2b0012ffff/55b18e62-14f1-425f-8acf-b4750125684b/audio.mp3?utm_source=Podcast&in_playlist=5873a3cb-298f-40bc-b71f-ae2b0013000d

item.title: Daily Digest — June 27, 2026
item.description:
Daily Digest — June 27, 2026
Episode: https://fluxwave.com/podcast/episodes/daily_show_2026-06-27.mp3 Transcript / show notes: https://fluxwave.com/podcast/episodes/transcript_2026-06-27.txt
Chapters: 0:52 — Socialists Sweep NYC, China Catches Up in Coding, AI Memory Crunch, Micron's Blo 3:30 — How Lenovo's CFO Is Allocating Capital During One of History's Biggest Booms 5:04 — How Lenovo's CFO Is Allocating Capital During One of History's Biggest Booms 6:50 — Pioneers of AI: Reid Hoffman says the AI race is not a cage match
Sources: - Socialists Sweep NYC, China Catches Up in Coding, AI Memory Crunch, Micron's Blowout Quarter (All-In with Chamath, Jason, Sacks & Friedberg) Link: https://allinchamathjason.libsyn.com/socialists-sweep-nyc-china-catches-up-in-coding-ai-memory-crunch-microns-blowout-quarter Source audio: https://dts.podtrac.com/redirect.mp3/traffic.libsyn.com/secure/allinchamathjason/ALLIN-E278_Ch.mp3?dest-id=1928300 - How Lenovo's CFO Is Allocating Capital During One of History's Biggest Booms (Odd Lots) Link: https://omny.fm/shows/odd-lots/how-lenovos-cfo-is-allocating-capital-during-one-of-historys-biggest-booms Source audio: https://podtrac.com/pts/redirect.mp3/tracking.swap.fm/track/UVBrz8bN8aM2Xe47PEPu/traffic.omny.fm/d/clips/e73c998e-6e60-432f-8610-ae210140c5b1/8a94442e-5a74-4fa2-8b8d-ae27003a8d6b/b1fa9369-e153-4071-8b62-b47400f4a30f/audio.mp3?utm_source=Podcast&in_playlist=982f5071-765c-403d-969d-ae27003a8d83 - Pioneers of AI: Reid Hoffman says the AI race is not a cage match (Masters of Scale) Source audio: https://dts.podtrac.com/redirect.mp3/prfx.byspotify.com/e/pscrb.fm/rss/p/tracking.swap.fm/track/7G0M4p2bOLP0mP50O3CD/rss.art19.com/episodes/78c9761a-1068-4d12-a6bd-3c327688497d.mp3?rss_browser=BAhJIhNQb2RjYXN0TW9uaXRvcgY6BkVU--2525c10adc632ac8804d73af95f80c3dcc556542

item.title: Daily Digest — June 26, 2026
item.description:
Daily Digest — June 26, 2026
Episode: https://fluxwave.com/podcast/episodes/daily_show_2026-06-26.mp3 Transcript / show notes: https://fluxwave.com/podcast/episodes/transcript_2026-06-26.txt
Chapters: 0:41 — The next big breakthrough will be AIs learning on the job 3:19 — Ben Carlson: The Numbers That Break Your Brain About Long Term Investing | #637 5:47 — Rory Johnston on Why His $200 Oil Prediction Didn't Turn Out Right 7:22 — Rory Johnston on Why His $200 Oil Prediction Didn't Turn Out Right
Sources: - The next big breakthrough will be AIs learning on the job (Dwarkesh Podcast) Link: https://www.dwarkesh.com/p/the-next-paradigm Source audio: https://api.substack.com/feed/podcast/203704568/b3a3986f8a780f554393d02d34bdcf51.mp3 - Ben Carlson: The Numbers That Break Your Brain About Long Term Investing | #637 (The Meb Faber Show - Better Investing) Source audio: https://traffic.megaphone.fm/TIFM4679638772.mp3 - Rory Johnston on Why His $200 Oil Prediction Didn't Turn Out Right (Odd Lots) Link: https://omny.fm/shows/odd-lots/rory-johnston-on-why-his-200-oil-prediction-didnt-turn-out-right Source audio: https://podtrac.com/pts/redirect.mp3/tracking.swap.fm/track/UVBrz8bN8aM2Xe47PEPu/traffic.omny.fm/d/clips/e73c998e-6e60-432f-8610-ae210140c5b1/8a94442e-5a74-4fa2-8b8d-ae27003a8d6b/774dd005-8b31-4ba1-9549-b474011e8753/audio.mp3?utm_source=Podcast&in_playlist=982f5071-765c-403d-969d-ae27003a8d83

item.title: Daily Digest — June 25, 2026
item.description:
Daily Digest — June 25, 2026
Episode: https://fluxwave.com/podcast/episodes/daily_show_2026-06-25.mp3 Transcript / show notes: https://fluxwave.com/podcast/episodes/transcript_2026-06-25.txt
Chapters: 0:40 — We Asked GMO’s Head of Asset Allocation Why This Bubble is Easy — But Investors 3:19 — Forty ways to pay for coffee in Japan 5:41 — #482 — More From Sam: The Iran Deal, College in the AI Age, Mamdani's DSA, and M
Sources: - We Asked GMO’s Head of Asset Allocation Why This Bubble is Easy — But Investors Will Get it Wrong (Excess Returns) Link: https://podcasters.spotify.com/pod/show/excess-returns/episodes/We-Asked-GMOs-Head-of-Asset-Allocation-Why-This-Bubble-is-Easy--But-Investors-Will-Get-it-Wrong-e3l7iod Source audio: https://traffic.megaphone.fm/APO9811321795.mp3 - Forty ways to pay for coffee in Japan (Complex Systems with Patrick McKenzie (patio11)) Link: https://www.complexsystemspodcast.com/japanpayments/ Source audio: https://pscrb.fm/rss/p/prfx.byspotify.com/e/media.transistor.fm/73ed9309/1119f698.mp3 - #482 — More From Sam: The Iran Deal, College in the AI Age, Mamdani's DSA, and More (Making Sense with Sam Harris) Link: https://wakingup.libsyn.com/482-more-from-sam-the-iran-deal-college-in-the-ai-age-mamdanis-dsa-and-more Source audio: https://traffic.libsyn.com/secure/wakingup/482_MFS_6-25-26_paywall.mp3?dest-id=480596

item.title: Daily Digest — June 24, 2026
item.description:
Daily Digest — June 24, 2026
Episode: https://fluxwave.com/podcast/episodes/daily_show_2026-06-24.mp3 Transcript / show notes: https://fluxwave.com/podcast/episodes/transcript_2026-06-24.txt
Chapters: 0:40 — Why Can't You Go Faster With AI? Focus on the Friction to Find Out 3:21 — GameStop CEO Ryan Cohen's $56B Plan to Take Over eBay 5:56 — The World Is (Still) Drowning in Sludge
Sources: - Why Can't You Go Faster With AI? Focus on the Friction to Find Out (Developer Tea) Link: http://www.developertea.com Source audio: https://dts.podtrac.com/redirect.mp3/cdn.simplecast.com/audio/c44db111-b60d-436e-ab63-38c7c3402406/episodes/fefacc17-e3d8-4484-b27e-7e3cc672fc72/audio/e1400875-9a2e-4fe1-8657-6cbf86180006/default_tc.mp3?aid=rss_feed&feed=dLRotFGk - GameStop CEO Ryan Cohen's $56B Plan to Take Over eBay (All-In with Chamath, Jason, Sacks & Friedberg) Link: https://allinchamathjason.libsyn.com/gamestop-ceo-ryan-cohens-56b-plan-to-take-over-ebay Source audio: https://dts.podtrac.com/redirect.mp3/traffic.libsyn.com/secure/allinchamathjason/ALLIN-INTV_Cohen_Ch.mp3?dest-id=1928300 - The World Is (Still) Drowning in Sludge (Freakonomics Radio) Link: https://freakonomics.com Source audio: https://mgln.ai/e/2/pdst.fm/e/dts.podtrac.com/redirect.mp3/stitcher.simplecastaudio.com/2be48404-a43c-4fa8-a32c-760a3216272e/episodes/ba0a769c-2363-46a5-8b60-ef16823921f7/audio/128/default.mp3?aid=rss_feed&awCollectionId=2be48404-a43c-4fa8-a32c-760a3216272e&awEpisodeId=ba0a769c-2363-46a5-8b60-ef16823921f7&feed=Y8lFbOT4

Chapters: 0:43 — Grace Shao on What the World Should Know About Chinese AI 3:41 — Grace Shao on What the World Should Know About Chinese AI 5:07 — Wild Weekend Recap: Iran Chaos, Global Shifts, and the Economic Debate Shaping O 7:29 — Inside The Democratic Party Civil War - Ezra Klein - #1114

Chapters: 1:00 — Anthropic's Co-Founder and Top Economist on Doing Research at the AI Frontier 2:46 — Anthropic's Co-Founder and Top Economist on Doing Research at the AI Frontier 4:35 — Bryan Taylor: There Is No Equity Risk Premium (Investing in America Series) #635 7:25 — Bryan Taylor: There Is No Equity Risk Premium (Investing in America Series) #635 10:07 — The data black hole at the center of AI

item.title: Daily Digest — May 13, 2026
item.description:

Episode: https://fluxwave.com/podcast/episodes/daily_show_2026-05-13.mp3 Transcript / show notes: https://fluxwave.com/podcast/episodes/transcript_2026-05-13.txt
Chapters: 0:29 — Energy, Minerals, and the Physical Stack Behind AI 3:10 — Energy, Minerals, and the Physical Stack Behind AI 6:10 — TypeScript, C# and Turbo Pascal with Anders Hejlsberg 9:27 — TypeScript, C# and Turbo Pascal with Anders Hejlsberg 12:45 — Samanth Subramanian on the Undersea Cables That Keep the Internet Alive
Sources: - Energy, Minerals, and the Physical Stack Behind AI (a16z Podcast) Link: https://a16z.simplecast.com/episodes/energy-minerals-and-the-physical-stack-behind-ai-9rkc7PLj Source audio: https://mgln.ai/e/1344/afp-848985-injected.calisto.simplecastaudio.com/3f86df7b-51c6-4101-88a2-550dba782de8/episodes/f2eabf57-0e65-4d82-92e2-749593773033/audio/128/default.mp3?aid=rss_feed&awCollectionId=3f86df7b-51c6-4101-88a2-550dba782de8&awEpisodeId=f2eabf57-0e65-4d82-92e2-749593773033&feed=JGE3yC0V - TypeScript, C# and Turbo Pascal with Anders Hejlsberg (The Pragmatic Engineer) Link: https://newsletter.pragmaticengineer.com/p/typescript-c-and-turbo-pascal-with Source audio: https://api.substack.com/feed/podcast/197401883/9d015fa8d84755f5f8ad8f2fca3705a8.mp3 - Samanth Subramanian on the Undersea Cables That Keep the Internet Alive (Odd Lots) Link: https://omny.fm/shows/odd-lots/samanth-subramanian-on-the-undersea-cables-that-keep-the-internet-alive Source audio: https://podtrac.com/pts/redirect.mp3/tracking.swap.fm/track/UVBrz8bN8aM2Xe47PEPu/traffic.omny.fm/d/clips/e73c998e-6e60-432f-8610-ae210140c5b1/8a94442e-5a74-4fa2-8b8d-ae27003a8d6b/d05e23d4-18e1-442f-8953-b4480146b311/audio.mp3?utm_source=Podcast&in_playlist=982f5071-765c-403d-969d-ae27003a8d83

Episode: https://fluxwave.com/podcast/episodes/daily_show_2026-05-13.mp3 Transcript / show notes: https://fluxwave.com/podcast/episodes/transcript_2026-05-13.txt
Chapters: 0:29 — Energy, Minerals, and the Physical Stack Behind AI 3:10 — Energy, Minerals, and the Physical Stack Behind AI 6:10 — TypeScript, C# and Turbo Pascal with Anders Hejlsberg 9:27 — TypeScript, C# and Turbo Pascal with Anders Hejlsberg 12:45 — Samanth Subramanian on the Undersea Cables That Keep the Internet Alive
Sources: - Energy, Minerals, and the Physical Stack Behind AI (a16z Podcast) Link: https://a16z.simplecast.com/episodes/energy-minerals-and-the-physical-stack-behind-ai-9rkc7PLj Source audio: https://mgln.ai/e/1344/afp-848985-injected.calisto.simplecastaudio.com/3f86df7b-51c6-4101-88a2-550dba782de8/episodes/f2eabf57-0e65-4d82-92e2-749593773033/audio/128/default.mp3?aid=rss_feed&awCollectionId=3f86df7b-51c6-4101-88a2-550dba782de8&awEpisodeId=f2eabf57-0e65-4d82-92e2-749593773033&feed=JGE3yC0V - TypeScript, C# and Turbo Pascal with Anders Hejlsberg (The Pragmatic Engineer) Link: https://newsletter.pragmaticengineer.com/p/typescript-c-and-turbo-pascal-with Source audio: https://api.substack.com/feed/podcast/197401883/9d015fa8d84755f5f8ad8f2fca3705a8.mp3 - Samanth Subramanian on the Undersea Cables That Keep the Internet Alive (Odd Lots) Link: https://omny.fm/shows/odd-lots/samanth-subramanian-on-the-undersea-cables-that-keep-the-internet-alive Source audio: https://podtrac.com/pts/redirect.mp3/tracking.swap.fm/track/UVBrz8bN8aM2Xe47PEPu/traffic.omny.fm/d/clips/e73c998e-6e60-432f-8610-ae210140c5b1/8a94442e-5a74-4fa2-8b8d-ae27003a8d6b/d05e23d4-18e1-442f-8953-b4480146b311/audio.mp3?utm_source=Podcast&in_playlist=982f5071-765c-403d-969d-ae27003a8d83

item.title: Daily Digest — May 12, 2026
item.description:
Daily Digest — May 12, 2026
Episode: https://fluxwave.com/podcast/episodes/daily_show_2026-05-12.mp3 Transcript / show notes: https://fluxwave.com/podcast/episodes/transcript_2026-05-12.txt
Chapters: 0:21 — Winston Weinberg: Speed, Stress, and Better Decisions 2:16 — Winston Weinberg: Speed, Stress, and Better Decisions 4:19 — Duolingo’s battle for learning in an AI world, with Luis von Ahn 6:18 — Duolingo’s battle for learning in an AI world, with Luis von Ahn 9:54 — Lloyd Blankfein on Risk, Crisis, and Leadership 12:33 — Lloyd Blankfein on Risk, Crisis, and Leadership
Sources: - Winston Weinberg: Speed, Stress, and Better Decisions (The Knowledge Project with Shane Parrish) Link: https://fs.blog/knowledge-project-podcast/winston-weinberg/ Source audio: https://pdst.fm/e/pscrb.fm/rss/p/claritaspod.com/measure/traffic.megaphone.fm/FSMI1836811628.mp3?updated=1778587764 - Duolingo’s battle for learning in an AI world, with Luis von Ahn (Masters of Scale) Source audio: https://dts.podtrac.com/redirect.mp3/prfx.byspotify.com/e/pscrb.fm/rss/p/tracking.swap.fm/track/7G0M4p2bOLP0mP50O3CD/rss.art19.com/episodes/febba34b-31a8-435e-bd17-f19fe6d6220e.mp3?rss_browser=BAhJIhNQb2RjYXN0TW9uaXRvcgY6BkVU--2525c10adc632ac8804d73af95f80c3dcc556542 - Lloyd Blankfein on Risk, Crisis, and Leadership (a16z Podcast) Link: https://a16z.simplecast.com/episodes/lloyd-blankfein-on-risk-crisis-and-leadership-v0_nsi13 Source audio: https://mgln.ai/e/1344/afp-848985-injected.calisto.simplecastaudio.com/3f86df7b-51c6-4101-88a2-550dba782de8/episodes/2bc4fcae-05a4-4e7d-a65b-04d73504c05a/audio/128/default.mp3?aid=rss_feed&awCollectionId=3f86df7b-51c6-4101-88a2-550dba782de8&awEpisodeId=2bc4fcae-05a4-4e7d-a65b-04d73504c05a&feed=JGE3yC0V
